uses: Torrubia pacurero has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Its roots and leaves are used to create remedies that help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Additionally, Torrubia pacurero is used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions due to its purported antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Torrubia pacurero for medicinal purposes.
